response.justification: The candidate meets the 15-year experience minimum and shows broad, hands-on engineering breadth with genuine entrepreneurial experience as a founder, but the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy and recognized AI expertise. His AI exposure is recent and tooling-level (MCP code generators, agentic workflow support since 2025), with no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no track record of strategic advisory or engineering leadership at the principal/director level.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, backend, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder experience running an open-source geo-data platform end to end, plus community teaching and conference talks
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products/platforms, which is central to the role
Career trajectory is senior/staff-level engineering, not director-level strategic or advisory leadership
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy work or influencing product direction at organizational scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise gap vs. role's core focus
